title: Stack Implementation using an Array
description: A visual representation of a stack data structure implemented with an array, showing key operations (Push, Pop), the top pointer, and array indices.
relationships: The Top pointer tracks the last filled index in the Array
Push increments the Top pointer and adds an element
Pop retrieves the element at the Top pointer and then decrements it
Stack Overflow occurs when Push is called on a full Array
Stack Underflow occurs when Pop is called on an empty Array
